name: Link Preview
summary: A hover card component that displays link preview screenshots using Radix UI HoverCard with spring animations.
detailedDescription: Link Preview creates interactive link previews that display website screenshots on hover using Radix UI's HoverCard primitive. The component generates screenshot URLs via Microlink API (when not static), encoding parameters for viewport size, device scale factor, and color scheme. Preview images are preloaded in a hidden div to ensure instant display. The hover card uses Framer Motion for enter animations - starting at opacity 0, y: 20, scale 0.6 and animating to full visibility with spring physics (stiffness: 100, damping: 15). Mouse movement triggers subtle horizontal sway using motion values - the card translates left/right based on cursor position within the trigger, creating a parallax effect. Card dimensions are configurable (default 200x125px), with quality and layout options. The component supports both dynamic screenshots and static images via isStatic prop. Open/close delays are set to 50ms/100ms for responsive feel. Transform origin is set to Radix's calculated value for natural animation. This creates polished link previews ideal for blogrolls, resource pages, or any context where visual link context enhances user experience.
purpose: Display visual previews of linked websites on hover
Generate screenshots dynamically via Microlink API
Add subtle parallax motion to hover interactions
behavior: Generates screenshot URL via Microlink API encoding
Preloads preview image for instant display
Animates card with spring physics on hover
Applies subtle x-axis sway on mouse movement
Uses Radix UI HoverCard for accessibility
Supports both dynamic and static image modes
visualCharacteristics: Subtle horizontal sway on mouse move
Transform origin based on trigger position
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
